dealSummary: Data analytics software developer Sigma raised an $80 million Series E led by Princeville Capital at a $3 billion valuation.
Gradiant, which offers water treatment technology, raised a Series E led by Safar Partners and Hostplus Superannuation Fund at a $2 billion valuation.
Tomorrow.io, the developer of a weather forecasting platform, secured an additional $35 million in a Series F extension from Pitango and Harel Insurance.
Melbourne-based defense tech startup Arkeus received an $18 million Series A led by QIC Ventures.
Blink, which offers a workforce management platform for frontline industries like restaurants, raised a $17 million round from Enlightened Hospitality Investments.
Cosmico, a Milan-based talent startup, raised $14 million in a round led by P101.
London-based Searchable, which focuses on AI search optimization, secured a $14 million round led by Headline at an $85 million valuation.
